posts.author: eduardo_worktables (Eduardo Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

I’m trying to query the subitems of a specific item and I’m not able to fetch them in the same sequence as it’s been shown in the monday.com board. I know that when we query items, they by default come ordered in the same sequence as they are shown in the board, but that same logic does not apply for the subitems. I think it would be nice to add a “position” field to the subitem object in the GraphQL API.

This might not be a big lift for the monday.com development team to do, but it would help us (monday.com app developers) so much.

Thanks in advanced!
